name: Browser Scraper
description: Re-scrape pages that failed text extraction using Playwright Chromium with CMS-aware fallback (Elementor, WordPress, Divi). Detects Cloudflare/bot-blocker pages in both input and own output (text markers + duplicate detection). Targets pages where page-scraper extracted < 50 words — JS-rendered SPAs, page-builder sites, Cloudflare-protected pages.
usage_notes: Run after page-scraper. Only re-scrapes pages where Readability extracted fewer than min_word_threshold words. Expensive (Playwright per page). Reduce concurrency on memory-constrained servers.

options.name: request_timeout
options.label: Browser timeout (ms)
options.description: Timeout per page for browser rendering. SPAs may need 15-30 seconds.

options.name: wait_for_network_idle
options.label: Wait for network idle
options.description: Wait until no network requests for 500ms. Slower but more reliable for SPAs.

options.name: min_word_threshold
options.label: Re-scrape threshold (words)
options.description: Only re-scrape pages with word_count below this value. Pages above are passed through unchanged.

options.name: max_content_length
options.label: Max extracted text (chars)
options.description: Truncate extracted text to this many characters.

options.name: concurrency
options.label: Concurrent browser tabs
options.description: Number of pages to render simultaneously. Browser is heavier than HTTP — keep low (2-4).
